briefdescription.para: Returns an estimate of the default volume used in the model.

detaileddescription.para: A bunch of heuristics to find good SimTimes to use for kkit. Returns runTime.

memberdef.argsstring: (Id func, vector< string > &msgs, map< double, pair< Id, int > > &compt_vol)
memberdef.name: storeFunctionMsgs

memberdef.argsstring: (Id tab, vector< string > &msgs, Id pool, string bg, Id comptid)
memberdef.name: storePlotMsgs

memberdef.argsstring: (ofstream &fout, Id id, string colour, string textcolour, double x, double y, Id comptid)
memberdef.name: writeEnz

memberdef.argsstring: (ofstream &fout, double simdt, double plotdt, double maxtime, double defaultVol)
memberdef.name: writeHeader

memberdef.argsstring: (ofstream &fout, Id id, string colour, string textcolour, double x, double y)
memberdef.name: writePlot

memberdef.argsstring: (ofstream &fout, Id id, string colour, string textcolour, double x, double y, Id comptid, int comptIndex)
memberdef.name: writePool

memberdef.argsstring: (ofstream &fout, Id id, string colour, string textcolour, double x, double y, Id comptid)
memberdef.name: writeReac
